## calcOutGivenIn variable

Calculate the expected amount of asset X gotten out when swaping an asset Y into a pool.

**Signature:**

```typescript
calcOutGivenIn: (tokenBalanceIn: BigNumber, tokenWeightIn: BigNumber, tokenBalanceOut: BigNumber, tokenWeightOut: BigNumber, tokenAmountIn: BigNumber, swapFee: BigNumber) => Decimal
```
